# GUINEA-PIG 10 TeV FFS quantum-SR endpoint grid scan
# f_rep=1 and n_b=1; luminosities are per bunch crossing in m^-2
# n_macroparticles=10000; cut_z_factor=6.0; transverse_extent is cut_x/y_factor in RMS units
# completed locally for n_cells=20,50,80,110,140; n_cells=170 and 200 were attempted but did not finish in a practical wall time
